Built on the OpenClaw runtime. Designed for Feishu users.

The
open-source
OpenClaw
client
you’ve
been
waiting
for.

Download the Mac app, double-click to install — your first agent is ready in seconds. No terminal, no config files needed.
Claude, GPT, Gemini, and more. Switch models anytime — no vendor lock-in. Use whatever works best for you.
Everything stays on your machine. No third-party servers. Your conversations, business data, and workflows never leave your computer.
nexu is completely free. Bring your own API key — no subscriptions, no per-seat fees, no hidden costs.
MIT-licensed and fully open. Community-driven development means features you actually need ship faster.

Freer. Safer.
Actually yours.

Model Flexibility
Switch between multiple models via GUI
Local-First
Configs and state stay on your device, no hosted business data
BYOK
Use your own API key, no login required
MIT Open Source
Fully auditable and forkable
Multi-IM Integration
Built-in support for Feishu, Slack, and Discord
Graphical Interface
No CLI needed, ready out of the box
Built-in Skills
OpenClaw and Feishu Skills included

Why
we
chose
open-source

Big
tech’s
AI
playbook
is
simple:
lock
in
the
model,
lock
in
the
data,
charge
monthly.
The
deeper
you
go,
the
harder
it
is
to
leave.
That’s
the
point.

We’re
building

different

an
AI
assistant
that’s

Closed-source

At

What you can do with nexu

Talk to your agent in Feishu. Let it handle the rest.

Indie developers — Drop an error screenshot into Feishu. Your agent pinpoints the bug, suggests a fix, and drafts the PR description for you.
E-commerce sellers — Tell your agent “plan a launch strategy and write product pages for three platforms.” Grab a coffee — it’ll be done when you get back.
Content creators — Monday morning: “Pick three angles for this week, draft each one, adjust the tone for each platform.” Content’s ready before lunch.

The best open-source openclaw desktop app for
